package rulefixtures

// scenario for make_slice_inside_hot_loop_same_shape: make([]T, ...) scratch slices recreated inside loops instead of being reused.
// fixture polarity: positive; family: hot_path; severity: info.
type Rule355PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario355Positive(records []Rule355PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
